q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is flask.redirect(bar) which performs URL redirection based on user-controlled input, making it dangerous in a test environment due to potential external resolution and redirection to malicious URLs.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: Not evaluated because Q1 was true - the sink is dangerous so we default to recorded_call strategy.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: Not evaluated because Q1 was true.

mock_guidance.capture: the bar parameter value being passed to redirect
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: return a mock Response object instead of performing actual redirection
notes: Mocking flask.redirect prevents actual HTTP redirection during testing
Capture the redirect target URL to verify it matches expected values
